title: node:test, Original Feed Fixtures, Property Cases, and Compile-Negative Evidence · Guided Contract Studio
summary: A disability-led research network incrementally builds layered TypeScript feed evidence suite from original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and browser fixtures while retaining prior TypeScript, Node, HTTP-client, Express, SQL, Git, accessibility, security, testing, async-cleanup, and recovery requirements. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of layered TypeScript feed evidence suite while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory,…
objectives: Create small original RSS, Atom, namespace, encoding, entity, depth, date, identity, revision, malformed, and oversized fixtures with exact expectations.
Test URL, discovery, parser options, unknown validation, normalization, schedule, cursor, state, and policy with injected clocks and ports.
Control deferred settlement, abort order, time, lease expiry, pool error, listener cleanup, and unhandled rejection evidence deterministically.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Workshop Feed Ts Original Fixture Mat…
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop TypeScript team handles case 4692 during an out-of-order Promise and AbortSignal rehearsal. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to reconcile original fixtures, deterministic async tests, compile-negative cases, and evidence non-claims; the release claim must bind source, compiler, emitted JavaScript, migrations, lockfile, package, image, configuration, and restored state; then change one PostgreSQL constraint, transaction, migration, upsert, query, or search plan and preserve admitted state. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Workshop Feed Ts Original Fixture Mat….
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for create small original rss, atom, namespace, encoding, entity, depth, date, identity, revision, malformed, and oversized fixtures with exact expectations.
